data_coverage_summary: Oracle Cloud SCM/Retail/TMS APIs has public documentation that indicates inventory and order-management workflows across inventory, orders, locations, shipments. Public Oracle SaaS REST/API docs.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface for order, inventory, and fulfillment orchestration rather than telemetry or physical asset monitoring. Oracle should be treated as a rest api surface for inventory and order-management workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Oracle Cloud SCM/Retail/TMS APIs indicates Public Oracle SaaS REST/API docs. The documented surface aligns with inventory and order-management workflows and covers inventory, orders, locations, shipments. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates order-management and fulfillment workflows spanning inventory availability, locations, shipments, and order state.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Oracle Cloud SCM/Retail/TMS APIs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as inventory and order-management workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
